commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Wisdom is the principal thing; therefore get wisdom: and with all your getting get understanding. The first part of wisdom is to desire it. For nothing hindereth from being just, but that justice is not desired. Augustine, in Psalm cxviii. ) (Worthington) "Wisdom is the principal thing; therefore get "(Protestants) (Haydock) It is the one thing necessary. (Calmet) The pearl, to acquire which we must part with every thing else, if required, Matthew xiii. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
